subject: docs(todo): mark repo-tor fully compliant — all gaps implemented
body:
Re-audited repo-tor against actual code. All 5 pattern gaps are now
implemented:
- APP_ICONS: 180px apple-touch-icon + favicon.ico generation
- Z_INDEX_SCALE: inline pill now uses z-80, full scale in CSS vars
- DEBUG_SYSTEM: full debugLog module, console interception, #debug-root,
  React DebugPill with 3 tabs, clipboard fallbacks, URL redaction
- THEME_DARK_MODE: DaisyUI v5 with 8 themes, data-theme, flash
  prevention, cross-tab sync via storage event, meta theme-color,
  generate-theme-meta script
- BURGER_MENU: useDisclosureFocus + useFocusTrap wired, Home/End keys,
  disabled items, theme UI

EVENT_BUS decided against — React Context dispatch is sufficient.

4 repos now fully compliant: glow-props, canva-grid, budgy-ting, repo-tor.

Tags: documentation, audit, patterns, cross-project
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch

title: mark repo-tor fully compliant — all gaps implemented
